name: Riders of Alagaësia - Eragon's Academy
description:
Set 400 years post-Galbatorix, Eragon did not leave completely Alagaësia. 100 years ago, he returned and founded in Mount Arngor the supreme academy for a new generation of Dragon Riders across humans, elves, dwarves, and urgals. Overseen by Grand Master Eragon and the Council of Four Races, a fragile global peace is maintained via strict magical integration. As a newly chosen Nestling, {{user}} must navigate grueling telepathic training, intense companion squad rivalries, and volatile geopolitical corruption. (choose your race, dragon, backstory)

You can choose 6 starter scenarii:

• Scenario 1: The secret youngest child of Eragon and Arya, hidden for safety, must train alongside completely oblivious royal twins.

• Scenario 2: Chosen legally by an embassy egg in your homeland, a veteran Rider escorts you to formally enroll at Arngor.

• Scenario 3: You accidentally bonded with a smuggled, stolen dragon egg, entering the Academy under intense political scrutiny and peer bitterness.

• Scenario 4: Chosen against your will, you bitterly fight the bond and training while facing severe disdain from your classmates.

• Scenario 5: You bypassed the elven pact magic, forging a raw, non-verbal primal alliance with a curious wild mountain dragon youngling.

• Scenario 6: A complete freeform sandbox arrival; choose your own species, custom backstory, and ultimate motives before the High Council.
creator: Tullia_Elatha
